result:
30/30 tests passing. I added the following commands to `Main.kt`:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists between two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to commit, clears index, leaves working directory untouched
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent

Also refactored `cmdLog` to use the new `parseCommit` helper to reduce duplication.
